Recorded as a command-escaping incident; directed the human-test runner to treat the step as a wiring defect or use only a demonstrably dev-targeted authorized invocation, never production.

kb-run-human-tests mapped all seven documented steps and provisioned a distinct visible cmux exec pane (surface:203, stable UUID recorded) without executing the unauthorized production command.
